text: billed twice for my monthly plan please refund the extra charge
resolution: Refunded duplicate charge within 24 hours, root cause was billing sync retry bug.

text: export keeps crashing when i try to download the full report
resolution: Advised smaller date range export as workaround, escalated to engineering.

text: outage again third time this month service down and i am considering cancelling
resolution: Escalated directly to account manager, offered service credit, retained customer.

text: our service went down again this is the third outage this month
resolution: Pattern flagged, escalated to reliability team and account manager.

text: checkout page giving 500 error since this morning cannot complete purchase
resolution: Matched active incident on status page, linked customer to incident tracker.

text: how do i update my billing address on file
resolution: Pointed customer to account settings > billing, resolved same day.

text: account locked after too many login attempts need urgent access
would love to see dark mode added to the app in a future update
resolution: Logged in product backlog, no ETA committed.
